ЁЯЪиUQIES to San Francisco, here we go! ЁЯЪи

UQIES is returning to the San Francisco Bay Area for 15 days inside the global epicentre of entrepreneurship, innovation and technology. ЁЯЗ║ЁЯЗ╕

ЁЯУЕ 27 June - 11 July 2026

ЁЯТ░ Approx. $4000 AUD per person

тП│ Applications close Tuesday, 10 March 1PM AEST

Startup visits. Cracked events. Workshops. Founder conversations. If youтАЩre looking to skyrocket your growth as an entrepreneur (or entrepreneur in the making) in 2026, this is your highest ROI opportunity.

Spots are limited. Selection based on quality of application + prior engagement with UQIES and/or entrepreneurship activities.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to the UQIES Instagram page, or email us at team@uqies.com.

Pico CTF & CrikeyCon Raffle
Hello everyone! This week for our event we will be creating teams to compete in PicoCTF, which is very beginner friendly (Targeted at HS students). We will also be raffling of some tix for CrikeyCon, if your a member make sure to join the raffle [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeUQk8khcNeTl2bU1Zk3wvHd1M5NC6hssXxGhS7c58uhhsZ6w/viewform)!

ЁЯУН Where? 32 - 215
ЁЯХТ When? 6pm - 8pm
ЁЯУЕ Date? March 11th (Wednesday)
тЭУ What? PicoCTF and raffle!
ЁЯНХ Pizza? Provided ЁЯЧ┐ (for members)

To get everyone into a team asap on the day, please fill out [this form](https://forms.gle/GnBpdVHUygACkitEA) before the event! We canтАЩt wait to see you all there!

# The funeral event for the beloved CSSE2310 Bomb
@everyone, We warmly invite you to join us in remembering and celebrating the CSSE2310 bomb,  which has unfortunately been taken from us far too soon due to UQтАЩs new secured assessment policy ЁЯШн
**Please bring laptops** as we will be running a reverse engineering workshop in honour of our beloved 2310 A2. 
to show respect to the bomb, **the server will now be in mourning**, with some further details on Wednesday.

Event info:

ЁЯХТ When? 6pm - 8pm

ЁЯСХ Attire? Please dress in black, or dark colours. This will not be strictly enforced.

Trust usтАж this is about to be the best part of your week ЁЯШотАНЁЯФе

This Wednesday, we are proudly hosting a talk from one of the largest tech companies in the world, Atlassian! They will be imparting on us some wisdom about security in regards to their company. Atlassian is Australia's largest tech company,  developing well known software such as Jira, Trello, and Bitbucket!

Are you passionate about building a safer digital world? Curious about how global tech companies protect their products and users? Join us for Security @ Atlassian, where youтАЩll discover exciting opportunities to kickstart your career in security!

Atlassian is a global leader in collaboration and productivity software, trusted by millions of users worldwide. Security is at the heart of everything they do, and their dedicated teams work tirelessly to keep their products and customers safe.

WeтАЩre excited to share that the event will be presented by someone who started their journey at Atlassian as an intern and grad, and has since grown their career within our security organisation. TheyтАЩll share their personal experiences, insights, and tips for making the most of your early career at Atlassian.

Whether youтАЩre just starting out or looking to take the next step, this is a fantastic opportunity to connect with Atlassian's team, ask questions, and explore how you can build your future with Atlassian Security!

ЁЯУН Where? 32 - 215
ЁЯХТ When? 6pm - 8pm
ЁЯУЕ Date? April 15th (Wednesday)
тЭУ What? Security @ Atlassian, presented by Atlassian!
ЁЯНХ Pizza? Provided (for members)

Early bird has closed and main round tickets are now on sale for GameJam 2026 - our weekend-long hackathon from 8-10 May. Build a game, gamify educational content or develop innovative gaming software - if it's got something to do with video games, we want to see it.

$4500 in prizes across 8 categories!

Best Overall ($1000) | People's Choice ($650) | Best Educational ($500) | Best Multiplayer ($500) | Best Story/Art ($500) | Best XR ($500) | Best Gaming Software ($500) | getcracked.io's Best Technical Execution ($350)

$50 per ticket
$75 per ticket + GameJam Shirt bundle

Missed out on early bird prices? Come to the "Introduction to Game Development Workshop" on the 30th of April, 4-6PM at Hawken Engineering Building (50), Room N202 to score an exclusive discount and get access to early bird prices.

Get them now ! 
https://events.humanitix.com/gamejam-2026

[AHEAD AT ASHURST PRE-PENULTIMATE PROGRAM]

Are you looking to gain an insight into commercial law at a top tier global law firm?┬а

Ahead at Ashurst┬аis an information evening that provides you the opportunity to explore a career in commercial law with a leading firm.┬а

Uncover the intricacies of the work, delve into our business operations and practice areas, and receive practical advice to kick start your career with confidence.

Ahead at Ashurst is open to all┬аsecond and third year undergraduate law students or first year Juris Doctor students.┬аPlease complete the registration form below to indicate your interest.┬а

Key Dates
┬а┬а┬а┬атАв┬а┬а┬а┬аWe will be accepting registrations until 11:59pm on Sunday 10 May 2026.

┬а┬а┬а┬атАв┬а┬а┬а┬аThe program will be held on Tuesday 2 June 2026, from 5.00pm in our Brisbane office.

"Do we really have time for this?"

UQ ENGG Revue returns in 2026 with our most ambitious show yet. With a cast worthy of Broadway and a writing team who put's Shakespeare to shame. With puns that will have you rolling, and harmonies that will bring a tear to your eye.

This year the Engineering revue takes you on a journey through time. Taking a moment to stop and appreciate the history of engineering, and all those who made it such a pain to study.

SHOW DATES:
Thursday - 13th August
Friday - 14th August

Tickets and "Time" details out soon, go to the event page via the link our bio and hit interested to keep up to date with the show and share with the friends you know will want to come along. ЁЯОЙтП░ЁЯХ║ЁЯТГ

Make your mark in 2026 тЬи Apply now to join the UQIES executive team!

Application form is available via the link in our bio.

The President, Secretary and Treasurer will be elected at the upcoming AGM (date TBA), and the new leadership team will review all exec applications to shape next yearтАЩs portfolios. Interviews kick off end of semester.

ЁЯЪА Why join?
ЁЯдЭ Community тАУ find your tribe and connect across UQ and beyond
ЁЯУИ Growth тАУ take ownership, build skills, and drive real projects
ЁЯМП Impact тАУ shape the future of startups and tech in Australia

Applications close on November 8th.

DM us or email team@uqies.com with any questions.
